title: GeneralisedFabricatedBoxProfile
description: GeneralisedFabricatedBoxProfile: Rectangular hollow profile that allows for different thicknesses of the webs, top flange and bottom flange as well as defined outstands of the top and bottom flange

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Width between the extreme fibres of the webs, excluding corbel widths. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopLeftCorbelWidth.description: The additional width added to the left side of the top flange, measured from the outside edge of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopRightCorbelWidth.description: The additional width added to the right side of the top flange, measured from the outside edge of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotLeftCorbelWidth.description: The additional width added to the left side of the bottom flange, measured from the outside edge of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotRightCorbelWidth.description: The additional width added to the right side of the bottom flange, measured from the outside edge of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
